message:
feat(core): add CRDT and Union-Find data structure modules

Add two new foundational data structure modules to frankenterm-core for
distributed state management and equivalence class tracking:

CRDT module (crdt.rs, 1273 lines):
- GCounter: grow-only counter for distributed agent event counting
- PnCounter: positive-negative counter with increment/decrement
- GSet: grow-only set for monotonic membership tracking
- OrSet: observed-remove set with add/remove tombstone semantics
- LwwRegister: last-writer-wins register for conflict resolution
- MvRegister: multi-value register preserving concurrent writes
- All types satisfy Strong Eventual Consistency (SEC) via
  join-semilattice merge operations (commutative, associative, idempotent)
- Serde serialization support for all types

Union-Find module (union_find.rs, 537 lines):
- Disjoint Set Union with path compression and union by rank
- O(alpha(n)) amortized per operation (inverse Ackermann)
- Component statistics tracking (sizes, counts, largest)
- Iterator over components and their members
- Use cases: correlated pane grouping, session topology tracking,
  error event clustering, pattern deduplication

Both modules include comprehensive proptest property-based test suites
(1100+ lines total) verifying algebraic properties, invariants, and
edge cases. Also adds a proptest regression seed for the existing
count_min_sketch tests.

Beads: ft-283h4.24 (CRDT), ft-283h4.23 (Union-Find)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc d41ddf7f1bd320fd5a8f4e2eb28b520aa511bde9c6a2a1b93e8fa76f1e282d99 # shrinks to (config, entries) = (CmsConfig { width: 141, depth: 1 }, [])
